rationale: Major friction: the bus-sorting puzzle hook telegraphs a slow, "relaxing" sort/puzzle game, which directly contradicts Flappy Dunk's energetic, reflex-based tap-to-fly competitive loop — viewers tapping in expecting a sorter will bounce on first session. Visually the cool blue/purple/orange member palette and stylus-hand POV clash with the warm-beige + magenta cartoon arcade DNA and the missing avatar/VS framing. Audience overlap is the only weak bridge (broad casual hypercasual users), so do NOT adopt this archetype as-is; at most, borrow only the "Hey! Have you ever played..." VO opener and reskin with hoop-chaining combo footage.
